text: Last class you sent a polite email with your report.
Today you share your opinion and help the team decide.
In my opinion, we need more time.
I agree with you. That is a good point.
I see your point, but I am not sure.
Maybe we could move the deadline.
Let us discuss the new deadline. In my opinion, the current date is fine.
I see your point, but I disagree. I am not sure the team has enough time.
That is a good point. What do you suggest?
Maybe we could ask the client for two more days. Can you clarify the budget first?
Good idea. So our decision is: ask for two more days. Thank you for your help.
Perfect. Let me summarize: we ask for two more days and check the budget.
Maybe we could ask for more time.

Hi Aline, this is Tom from the project team. I am calling about our team meeting tomorrow at ten. I just sent you the agenda, so please take a look before we start. We have three topics to discuss, and the most important one is the new deadline for the client. I would really like you to contribute your opinion, because you know the project very well. If you agree with the plan, that is great, and if you disagree, please say so. We need a clear decision by the end of the meeting. After that, someone will summarize the main points for the team. Thank you, and see you tomorrow.

This is a quick note to myself before the team meeting. First, I read the agenda, so I know the topics we will discuss. Then I prepare my opinion about the new deadline, because Tom asked me to contribute. In the meeting, I will share my idea in a clear and polite way. If I agree with a plan, I will say that is a good point. If I disagree, I will say I see your point, but I am not sure, and then I will suggest a better option. I want to ask one question to clarify the budget. At the end, I will help the team reach a decision and summarize the next steps. I feel ready to speak up.

First, Aline reads the agenda, so she knows the topics. Then she prepares her opinion about the deadline. After that, she shares her idea and asks one question to clarify the budget. Next, the team discusses the options and agrees on a plan. Finally, they reach a decision and Aline summarizes the next steps.
In my opinion, we need more time.
We need a clear decision today.
Let me summarize the next steps.
I agree with you. That is a good point.
I see your point, but I am not sure.
Maybe we could ask for more time.
